channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇭🇷 Croatia Rejects Proposed Israeli Ambassador Over Government Policies
item.description: Croatian President Milanović says the nominee will not receive approval, citing actions of the current Israeli government and a diplomatic protocol dispute.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: 🇩🇪 Merkel Criticizes EU for Not Talking to Russia on Ukraine
item.description: Former German Chancellor Angela Merkel said the EU should maintain dialogue with Russia, though she declined to lead such talks herself, in a rare political intervention.
item.dc:creator: Politico

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria Joins G7 Finance Sessions in Paris in Sign of Legitimization
item.description: Syria will participate in closed-door G7 finance minister meetings in Paris, a sign of its growing international status less than two years after the fall of Assad.
item.dc:creator: Jerusalem Post

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Establishes New Body to Manage Strait of Hormuz Amid Stalled Talks
item.description: Iran formed the Persian Gulf Strait Authority (PGSA) to manage the vital shipping route as peace negotiations with the US remained deadlocked.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇬🇱 Greenland PM Tells US Envoy: Self-Determination Cannot Be Negotiated
item.description: Greenland Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen met with US special envoy Jeff Landry and reaffirmed that Greenland self-determination is not for negotiation.
item.dc:creator: Anadolu Agency

item.title: ⚔️ Israel-Hezbollah fighting continues despite truce extension
item.description: Israel and Hezbollah continue to clash along the Lebanon border despite an extended ceasefire, with Lebanon's death toll approaching 3,000 since March.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇸 Dollar firms, oil climbs as bond rout saps risk appetite
item.description: The US dollar strengthened and oil prices rose as a global bond market sell-off dampened investor risk appetite amid ongoing Iran-US tensions.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo XIV to launch first encyclical on AI with Anthropic co-founder
item.description: Pope Leo XIV will release his first major document addressing artificial intelligence and human dignity, with Anthropic's co-founder participating in the Vatican launch.
item.dc:creator: PBS

item.title: 🌍 Africa faces mounting crisis as USAID cuts deepen humanitarian gaps
item.description: African nations are struggling with worsening humanitarian crises as USAID funding cuts create critical gaps in food aid, health services, and refugee support.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian strike hits Chinese-linked cargo ship near Odesa as Putin heads to China
item.description: Ukraine reported a Russian attack on a Chinese-linked cargo vessel near Odesa, coinciding with Putin's visit to China, calling it a "terrible mistake."
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian troops in northern Pokrovsk nearly cut off as Russian drones dominate logistics
item.description: Ukrainian forces in northern Pokrovsk face encirclement as Russian drone superiority disrupts critical supply lines along the front.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky's ex-chief of staff released on over $3 million bail amid corruption probe
item.description: Ukraine's former presidential chief of staff was released on bail exceeding $3 million as part of a major corruption investigation.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 💥 Drone strike sparks fire at UAE nuclear power plant complex near Barakah
item.description: A drone strike caused a fire at the edge of the UAE's Barakah nuclear power plant complex, straining the fragile Iran war ceasefire.
item.dc:creator: Fortune

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump approval hits new low as Iran war drags down ratings
item.description: Polls show President Trump's approval rating falling to a second-term low as the Iran conflict and rising costs weigh on public sentiment.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🌍 Kenya hosts Africa summit as Macron visits amid fuel price protests
item.description: Kenya welcomed French President Macron for an Africa summit as domestic protests over fuel price hikes continued to disrupt daily life.
item.dc:creator: AP

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's economy slows in April as output and retail sales miss forecasts
item.description: China reported weaker-than-expected industrial output and retail sales data for April, signaling continued economic headwinds.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🌍 Kenya protests erupt over fuel price hikes, strike strands commuters
item.description: Kenyan streets filled with protesters as fuel price increases sparked strikes and left commuters stranded across major cities.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺 Global bond rout deepens as inflation fears mount
item.description: Global government bond prices fell sharply as investors priced in persistent inflation risks, pushing yields higher across major economies.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo to issue first major document addressing AI on May 25
item.description: Pope Leo XIV will release his first encyclical on May 25, focusing on artificial intelligence and its implications for human dignity.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🚢 Hantavirus-stricken cruise ship MV Hondius arrives in Rotterdam
item.description: The cruise ship MV Hondius, hit by a hantavirus outbreak, docked at its final destination in Rotterdam with remaining crew preparing to disembark.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran creates new Hormuz Strait management body amid US conflict
item.description: Iran announced the creation of the Persian Gulf Strait Authority to manage the strategic waterway amid ongoing tensions with the United States.
item.dc:creator: Channel News Asia

item.title: 🛢️ IEA chief warns commercial oil inventories depleting rapidly, only weeks left
item.description: IEA Executive Director Fatih Birol warned that commercial oil stockpiles are draining fast, with only weeks of supply buffer remaining.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 💥 Israel continues Lebanon strikes despite ceasefire extension
item.description: Israel carried out additional airstrikes in Lebanon despite an extended ceasefire agreement, with Hezbollah returning fire.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: ⚔️ US-Iran War: Live updates on conflict, oil prices, and diplomacy
item.description: BBC's live coverage of the ongoing US-Iran conflict, including developments on the ceasefire, oil markets, and diplomatic efforts.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🦠 Ebola outbreak spreads: Congo to open 3 treatment centers as rare strain advances
item.description: The WHO declared the Ebola outbreak a global health emergency after more than 300 suspected cases and 88 deaths in Congo and Uganda.
item.dc:creator: PBS
